summary: Tested all 7 audit panel features for the Embriovet dashboard. Fixed a critical bug: username in historico_edicoes was always '—' due to wrong session_state key. All features verified working after the fix.
action_items: BUG FIXED: Line 381 in app.py - username was 'st.session_state.get("username", "—")' but user is stored at 'st.session_state["user"]["username"]. Fixed to 'st.session_state.get("user", {}).get("username", "—")'. Entries created BEFORE this fix show '—' as username (historico_edicoes ID=1).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: registar_historico_edicao (app.py line 381) was reading st.session_state.get('username', '—') but username is stored at st.session_state['user']['username']. Fixed to st.session_state.get('user', {}).get('username', '—').
Streamlit dialog renders duplicate buttons (2 ✏️ + 2 🗑️ per row in DOM), but only 1 of each is visually shown. This is a Streamlit rendering behavior, not a critical issue.
The audit panel correctly shows 'Sem alterações registadas' when same values are submitted - this is correct UX behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 historico_edicoes entries for testing: ID=1 (transfer, no changes, user=— before fix), ID=2 (transfer Quantidade 18→15, user=admin), ID=3 (insemination Palhetas 3→1, user=admin).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streamlit app at http://localhost:8501. Login: admin/admin123. Audit feature (historico_edicoes table) is WORKING. Test flow: Dashboard → click ✏️ near 'ATIVIDADE RECENTE' → Logs modal opens → click ✏️ on an entry → navigates to edit page (Transf.Int/Ext or Inseminação) → make change → click 'Atualizar ...' → return to Dashboard → re-open modal → green '📋 Histórico de Edição' panel appears in col2 of edited entry. Bug fixed: app.py line 381 username key was wrong. historico_edicoes table has 3 entries from testing.

tests_results.test_1_modal_opens_on_edit_click: PASS - Modal 'Gerir Logs de Atividade' opens correctly when clicking ✏️ near ATIVIDADE RECENTE
tests_results.test_2_internal_transfer_edit_prefill: PASS - Clicking ✏️ in modal navigates to Transf.Int/Ext with '⚠️ Modo de Edição' banner, data pre-filled, 'Atualizar Transferência' button visible
tests_results.test_3_audit_panel_after_transfer_update: PASS - After updating transfer (Qtd 18→15), green audit panel appears in col2 of that entry in modal
tests_results.test_4_audit_panel_content: PASS - Audit panel shows: 'Quantidade: 18 → 15' with old value strikethrough red and new value green, 'Por admin · 06/03/2026 16:47'
tests_results.test_5_non_edited_entries_empty_col2: PASS - 4 external transfer entries and 1 non-edited internal transfer show empty col2 (no audit panel). Only 2 of 10 entries show audit panel.
tests_results.test_6_insemination_audit: PASS - Edited insemination (Palhetas 3→1) shows green audit panel: '📋 Histórico de Edição' with 'Palhetas: 3 → 1' and 'Por admin · ...'
tests_results.test_7_dashboard_edit_prefix: PASS - Edited records show '✏️ Transferência interna' and '✏️ Inseminação' prefixes in the ATIVIDADE RECENTE table on Dashboard

rca_of_issue.root_cause: app.py line 381: registar_historico_edicao() called st.session_state.get('username', '—') but in the Embriovet app, the user is stored as a dict at st.session_state['user']['username']. There is NO direct 'username' key at the top level of session_state.
rca_of_issue.impact: All audit entries created before this fix show '—' as username. After fix, correct username ('admin') is stored.
